name: Following Pointer
summary: A custom cursor enhancement component where a decorative element smoothly follows the mouse pointer with delayed motion, creating fluid trails and interactive highlights that elevate cursor presence.
detailedDescription: The Following Pointer component transforms the standard mouse cursor into an engaging interactive element by adding a decorative follower that trails smoothly behind the actual pointer. This creates a fluid, organic motion that makes cursor movement feel more deliberate and visually interesting. The follower element can be a dot, circle, glow, or custom shape that maintains a slight delay behind the actual cursor position, creating smooth interpolation that feels weighty and natural. The effect uses requestAnimationFrame for smooth 60fps motion tracking. Visual options include size variations, color treatments, blend modes for interesting interactions with underlying content, and scale effects that respond to hover states over interactive elements. Perfect for creative portfolios, design-focused sites, or any interface where elevating the cursor from functional to feature enhances the overall aesthetic. The component includes touch device detection to disable the effect where inappropriate, ensuring consistent UX across input methods.
purpose: Enhance standard cursor with decorative following element
Create fluid, organic cursor motion with delayed trailing
Elevate cursor from functional to featured design element
Add interactive visual interest to cursor movement
behavior: Tracks mouse position with smooth following element
Applies slight delay creating natural trailing motion
Supports customizable follower shapes and styles
Optionally scales or changes on hover over interactive elements
Detects touch devices to disable appropriately
Maintains performance with efficient position tracking
visualCharacteristics: Decorative element smoothly trailing cursor position
Fluid, organic motion feeling weighty and natural
Customizable shapes from dots to glows to custom designs
Subtle elevation of standard cursor functionality
recommendations: Use where moderate motion and reusable composition improve UX and clarity.
